description_long: This object consists of three chairs arranged side by side, with two modern black chairs featuring metal frames and a single rustic wooden chair. The black chairs have a minimalist design with flat, rectangular seats and backs, supported by slender, tubular metal legs. The wooden chair stands out with its natural wood grain, ladder-style backrest, and solid square legs, giving it a more traditional appearance. The seats of the black chairs are plain and smooth, while the wooden chair has a slightly textured, matte finish. All three chairs have backrests but lack armrests, and their sturdy construction suggests they are suitable for public or communal urban spaces. The combination of materials and styles makes this group versatile for use in parks, waiting areas, or outdoor cafes.
description: A set of three chairs: two modern black metal-framed chairs and one rustic wooden chair, all with backrests and no armrests, suitable for urban public seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of all three chairs, highlighting the thickness of the seats and the difference in leg design between the metal and wooden chairs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the seat surfaces and backrests, clearly contrasting the black metal chairs with the wooden chair's ladder-back design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the wooden chair's solid construction and the uniformity of the black chairs' frames.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backrest designs, with the wooden chair's slatted back and the plain backs of the black chairs.
